goal.objective: Fix Atlas UI crash when clicking coverage report or lint report. Success criteria: (1) clicking Coverage Report from localhost:3000 does not throw console errors and shows the expected report/error-empty state; automated regression test is added first and demonstrates RED->GREEN; manual browser QA captures screenshot/log. (2) clicking Lint Report from localhost:3000 does not throw console errors and shows the expected report/error-empty state; automated regression test is added first and demonstrates RED->GREEN; manual browser QA captures screenshot/log. (3) adjacent report navigation remains stable for malformed/empty report data, with a named regression test and manual browser check. Validate with affected tests, typecheck/lint/build where available, and real browser interaction against the running app.
